name: 沈家洞房
era_style: 明代中晚期官宦府邸洞房
description: 喜庆华丽的洞房，中央大红喜床挂鸳鸯帐与盖头，红烛高照，地面铺红毯，墙壁满饰喜字剪纸和金丝绸缎，侧边置水盆与妆台，布局浪漫私密，装饰以红色金饰和喜庆织物为主，营造新婚浓烈氛围。
visual_reference: Luxurious bridal chamber in late Ming dynasty mansion, large red silk canopy bed with mandarin duck embroidery and bridal veil, flickering red candles, red carpet floor, walls covered in double-happiness cutouts and satin drapes, wash basin and vanity, warm romantic night atmosphere, highly detailed cinematic
lighting: 夜晚红烛摇曳的温暖橘光，投下柔和浪漫阴影
emotional_range: 洞房嘲讽的尴尬到女主泪眼平静的隐忍
